videos.headline: Oklahoma retakes lead as Mayfield goes deep
videos.description: Trailing for the first time, Baker Mayfield airs it out to Mark Andrews along the right sideline for a 59-yard touchdown, putting the Sooners up 29-24.

videos.headline: Oklahoma holds on to beat rival Texas
videos.description: The Sooners rebound from a loss to Iowa State to knock off the Longhorns 29-24 in the Red River Showdown.

videos.headline: Oklahoma strikes early with 54-yard TD pass
videos.description: Baker Mayfield finds Jeff Badet with a 54-yard pass to burn Texas' defense.

videos.headline: Anderson dives into end zone for Sooners' TD
videos.description: Rodney Anderson rushes up the middle and reaches out to score a 15-yard touchdown, giving Oklahoma a 17-0 lead.

videos.headline: Texas gets on the board with screen pass TD
videos.description: Sam Ehlinger draws the pass rush toward him and throws a screen pass to Kyle Porter who takes it in 16 yards for a Longhorns TD.

videos.headline: Oklahoma's Mayfield throws first INT of sesaon
videos.description: Baker Mayfield throws his first interception of the season and his first pick in his last 201 passing attempts.

videos.headline: Mayfield throws for 197 yards in big Sooners first half
videos.description: Oklahoma leans on Baker Mayfield and its potent offense to build a 20-10 halftime lead over Texas.

videos.headline: Late hit on Mayfield leads to scuffle
videos.description: QB Baker Mayfield takes a shot while on the ground, leading to a small tussle between Oklahoma and Texas. Despite being shaken up on the play, Mayfield would return to the game.

videos.headline: Texas airs it out for long gain
videos.description: Longhorns' QB Sam Ehlinger goes deep to find a wide-open Devin Duvernay for a 42-yard pickup.

videos.headline: QB Ehlinger uses legs to give Longhorns fourth-quarter lead
videos.description: Sam Ehlinger scrambles along the right sideline and lowers his shoulder at the goal line to score from eight yards out, giving Texas a 24-23 lead.

videos.headline: Sooners score late to defeat Longhorns
videos.description: Oklahoma scores late to win the first Texas-Oklahoma game since 1947 in which both teams featured head coaches in their first season at the school.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Sooners score late to defeat Longhorns) 2017/10/14 ENHL

videos.headline: Sooners pick up big gain on trick play
videos.description: Trey Sermon receives a handoff and surprises the defense by throwing a pass, finding Marquise Brown wide open down the field for a 42-yard gain.

videos.headline: Texas' Hemphill-Mapps makes leaping one-handed grab
videos.description: Reggie Hemphill-Mapps jumps up and reaches out with one hand to haul in Sam Ehlinger's pass for a seven-yard gain.

videos.headline: Riley pleased with Sooners' first-half performance
videos.description: Oklahoma coach Lincoln Riley says his team "played well in the first half" against Texas, but says they needs to do better on third downs in the second half.

videos.headline: Mayfield on injury: 'Gonna have to do a lot more to keep me out'
videos.description: Oklahoma QB Baker Mayfield discusses the injury he suffered from a late hit, saying there was no way he was coming out of the game in his last matchup against Texas.

videos.headline: Riley: Oklahoma-Texas rivalry is 'best in college football'
videos.description: Sooners coach Lincoln Riley talks about the 29-24 win over Texas in the Red River Showdown, saying that even when they were up early, he knew it would come down to the wire.

videos.headline: Mayfield back in Heisman race with gritty win
videos.description: Todd Blackledge and Joe Tessitore break down Baker Mayfield's performance in the Red River Showdown and why he's among the top Heisman Trophy candidates.

videos.headline: Warren pounds it in for Longhorns TD
videos.description: With the help of QB Sam Ehlinger pushing from behind, Texas' Chris Warren III plows into the end zone from one yard out, cutting Oklahoma's lead to 6.
